title: Root test script skips the @sqlfu/pg test suite

evidence.quote: "build": "pnpm --filter sqlfu build && pnpm --filter @sqlfu/pg build && pnpm --filter @sqlfu/ui build && pnpm --filter sqlfu-website build"

reasoning: The workspace build and typecheck scripts treat @sqlfu/pg as a first-class package, and the feature metadata lists pg tests under the expected `pnpm test` command. However, the root `pnpm test` script only runs `sqlfu` and `@sqlfu/ui`, so pg regression coverage is silently omitted from the standard quality command. That means schema diff, materialization, fixture, and migration-lock regressions can pass CI or local checks when developers run the advertised root test command.
reproduction: Run `pnpm test` from the workspace root and observe that it invokes only `pnpm --filter sqlfu test` and `pnpm --filter @sqlfu/ui test`, never `pnpm --filter @sqlfu/pg test`.
recommendation: Include `pnpm --filter @sqlfu/pg test` in the root `scripts.test`, preferably between sqlfu and ui to mirror the package ordering used by build/typecheck.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: The skipped tests live under `packages/pg/test`, but the root script does not invoke that package's test command, so they cannot detect their own omission from the workspace-level command.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add or update a package-script validation test, if the repo has one, that asserts every package included in root build/typecheck and exposing a test script is also included in root `pnpm test`.

history.reasoning: The original evidence path still exists, but the cited root script no longer matches the finding. Current package.json line 28 is "test": "pnpm --filter sqlfu test && pnpm --filter @sqlfu/pg test && pnpm --filter @sqlfu/ui test", so the root test script now includes the @sqlfu/pg test suite between sqlfu and ui, matching the recommendation. The pg package still exposes a test script, and the referenced pg test files still exist. Running pnpm test -- --run could not complete in this read-only sandbox because vitest tried to write a Vite temp config under node_modules and hit EPERM, but the command output confirms the root script now invokes pnpm --filter @sqlfu/pg test. This finding is fixed.
commands: rg --files packages/pg/test && nl -ba package.json | sed -n '20,35p' && nl -ba packages/pg/test/diff-schema.test.ts | sed -n '1,80p' && nl -ba packages/pg/test/materialize-schema.test.ts | sed -n '1,80p' && nl -ba packages/pg/test/migration-lock.test.ts | sed -n '1,90p'
